form.formComment: Four-year-old mare facing the starter for the second time. At debut 7th (Fr1) over 2190m at this track, beaten 40 m by Pick Me (2:45.60) in 4yo+ 0-2 WINs on March 22 at $41. Others preferred at this stage.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth after a quick start, behind Island Tee Rex at Bunbury over 2100m in a 4yo+ NR up to 55 on March 28 at $26. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after a quick start, behind Diamond Bay at Bunbury over 1609m in a 4yo+ NR up to 59 M on April 4 at $31. In the mix from the inside draw.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 5th (Fr1) over 1177m at Pinjarra beaten 9 m by Ideal Interest (1:22.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $7.50. The run before 9th (Sr4) over 1776m at Wagin beaten 30 m by Wesmedad (2:13.70) in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs M on March 27 at $19. Suitably placed and can turn things around.

form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when second at Pinjarra on April 6. Proved too good the start before at Pinjarra on March 30. Well placed to go one better.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr3) over 1776m after showing early pace at Wagin beaten 5 m by American Monarch (2:13.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 2 at $23. Before that, 9th (Sr1) over 2242m at Narrogin beaten 50 m by Art Ideal (2:46.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 65 on March 13 at $61. Must be included.

form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr5) over 2100m at Bunbury beaten 21 m by Brought To Light (2:35.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on April 4 at $151. At the start before was well back in the run when 7th (Sr2) over 2100m after racing wide at Bunbury, beaten 12 m by Hotfoot It (2:35.80) in 4yo+ NR 55 to 60 on March 28 at $8. Not out of the equation.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 8th (Fr2) over 1776m after showing early pace at Wagin, beaten 20 m by American Monarch (2:13.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 2 at $151. Before that was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 2180m at Wagin beaten 40 m by Alexandra Thegreat (2:44.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 27 at $31. Hard to recommend on recent form.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Sr2) over 1776m at Wagin, beaten 21 m by American Monarch (2:13.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 2 at $34. Two runs back 7th (Fr3) over 2180m after showing early speed at Wagin beaten 25 m by Beyond Bling (2:45.20) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on March 27 at $10. Recent form suggests she needs to lift.
